---
title: "Development Environment"
format: html
---

First, setup your environment [Setup of VS Code and `venv`](https://halgoz.quarto.pub/pythonia/content/00b_setup.html).

You may want to check out how to install and remove packages through VS Code without the command line, here: [Python environments in VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/python/environments).

We also want to open Jupyter Notebooks in VS Code. Checkout the overview and the following tutorials in: [Data Science in VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/datascience/overview).
